BrighterlyHomepage

Online ELA Tutor

  • Remote

Join Brighterly as an Online ELA Teacher! Deliver fun ELA 1-on-1 lessons with ready materials, flexible hours & full training. 🚀

✨ Let’s make learning brighter together!

Job description

Brighterly is a fast-growing EdTech platform that helps children across the USA (K–8) excel in English Language Arts and Math through fun, personalized, and interactive 1-on-1 online lessons.


We believe that strong literacy and numeracy skills build confidence, spark curiosity, and shape a brighter future. 🌟

What You’ll Do

  • Deliver engaging 1-on-1 ELA lessons that make learning fun and effective.

  • Help students build confidence in reading, writing, listening and speaking.

  • Use ready-made materials and detailed lesson scripts — no need to create your own content.

  • Track each child’s progress and share insights with our academic team.

  • Continuously improve class engagement and student experience.

What We Offer

  • 💻 Work from home with flexible hours.

  • 📚 All teaching materials and scripts provided.

  • 🎓 Full training in Brighterly’s teaching methodology and tools.

  • 💬 Ongoing support from our experienced and friendly team.

  • 🚀 Career growth and mentorship from top educators.

  • 🌱 Regular professional development opportunities.

Job requirements

What We’re Looking For

  • C1+ English proficiency, with a clear, neutral accent.

  • A passion for teaching young learners and making lessons engaging.

  • At least 6 months of teaching experience with children.

  • At least high-school level language knowledge and diploma.

  • Strong knowledge of phonics, reading comprehension & writing.

  • Patience, empathy, and excellent communication skills.

  • Availability for at least 20 hours/week (weekdays - priority).

✨ Let’s make learning brighter together!

Questions

Please fill in additional questions

Please make sure you leave your phone number in the international format. A phone number in full international format includes a plus sign (+) followed by the country code, city code, and local phone number, e.g. +381222333444


I am 18 years old or older *
Current Brighterly teacher recommended to me to apply for this job *
How did you hear about us? *
Do you have a bachelor degree in education (or a similar field)?  *
How many years of teaching experience do you have? *
Are you ready to work at least 20 hours per week between 4 pm and 8 pm (New York timezone)? *
In case you're selected for the role, how soon would you be able to complete a 5-hour-long onboarding training course covering: Brighterly overview, how to adopt Brighterly materials and use them to teach online, how to use Brighterly Teacher Room and other teaching tools, how to communicate effectively. *
Legal Agreements

Please make sure our emails are delivered to your inbox and not your spam folder.

Check your spam email folder, and if it's in your spam folder, remember to mark the email as not spam.

I understand that the hiring process is a strictly confidential matter and I hereby agree not to disclose any data regarding the process, such as emails, video recordings, photos, documents, etc. Any violation shall result in the removal of your application from the process.

I confirm I am not a resident of the following territories: Russia, Crimea, Cuba, Lebanon, Venezuela, Iran, North Korea, Syria, Myanmar, Yemen, Pakistan and I can provide documentary proof.

Each party will only disclose personal data to the other party to process strictly for the Permitted Purpose, namely the hiring process. Applicant confirms that it is entitled to provide Applicant Data to Brighterly for the Permitted Purpose and that all Applicant Data provided to Brighterly is accurate and up to date.

All fields marked with * are required.
